(German pronunciation: [[ˈfɛltˌmɔxɪŋ ˈhaːzn̩ˌbɛʁgl̩]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Standard_German "Help:IPA/Standard German"); [Central Bavarian](/wiki/Central_Bavarian "Central Bavarian"): *Fejdmoching-Hosnbeagl*) is the northernmost borough of the city of [Munich](/wiki/Munich "Munich") in [Bavaria](/wiki/Bavaria "Bavaria"), [Germany](/wiki/Germany "Germany"). It contains the [S-Bahn](/wiki/Munich_S-Bahn "Munich S-Bahn") railway station of [München-Feldmoching](/wiki/M%C3%BCnchen-Feldmoching_station "München-Feldmoching station").[[1]](#cite_note-1)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Borough of Munich, Germany

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/a/a7/M%C3%BCnchen_-_Stadtbezirk_24_%28Karte%29_-_Feldmoching_-_Hasenbergl.png/250px-M%C3%BCnchen_-_Stadtbezirk_24_%28Karte%29_-_Feldmoching_-_Hasenbergl.png)](/wiki/File:M%C3%BCnchen_-_Stadtbezirk_24_(Karte)_-_Feldmoching_-_Hasenbergl.png)

Location of Feldmoching-Hasenbergl in Munich

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/b/b0/Lerchenauer_See_mit_Blick_nach_S%C3%BCdwesten.jpg/250px-Lerchenauer_See_mit_Blick_nach_S%C3%BCdwesten.jpg)](/wiki/File:Lerchenauer_See_mit_Blick_nach_S%C3%BCdwesten.jpg)

Lerchenauer See

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/1/1b/Fasaneriesee_Muenchen-9.jpg/250px-Fasaneriesee_Muenchen-9.jpg)](/wiki/File:Fasaneriesee_Muenchen-9.jpg)

Fasaneriesee

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/3/32/Regattastrecke_Oberschlei%C3%9Fheim_Zielbereich.jpg/250px-Regattastrecke_Oberschlei%C3%9Fheim_Zielbereich.jpg)](/wiki/File:Regattastrecke_Oberschlei%C3%9Fheim_Zielbereich.jpg)

Regatta course

**Feldmoching-Hasenbergl** (German pronunciation: [[ˈfɛltˌmɔxɪŋ ˈhaːzn̩ˌbɛʁgl̩]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Standard_German "Help:IPA/Standard German"); [Central Bavarian](/wiki/Central_Bavarian "Central Bavarian"): *Fejdmoching-Hosnbeagl*) is the northernmost borough of the city of [Munich](/wiki/Munich "Munich") in [Bavaria](/wiki/Bavaria "Bavaria"), [Germany](/wiki/Germany "Germany"). It contains the [S-Bahn](/wiki/Munich_S-Bahn "Munich S-Bahn") railway station of [München-Feldmoching](/wiki/M%C3%BCnchen-Feldmoching_station "München-Feldmoching station").[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## Location

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Feldmoching-Hasenbergl&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Location")]

Feldmoching-Hasenbergl is surrounded by: [Allach-Untermenzing](/wiki/Allach-Untermenzing "Allach-Untermenzing"), [Moosach](/wiki/Moosach_(Munich) "Moosach (Munich)") and [Milbertshofen-Am Hart](/wiki/Milbertshofen-Am_Hart "Milbertshofen-Am Hart") in the south, and [Karlsfeld](/wiki/Karlsfeld "Karlsfeld") and [Oberschleißheim](/wiki/Oberschlei%C3%9Fheim "Oberschleißheim") in the north.

## Description

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Feldmoching-Hasenbergl&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Description")]

It contains four lakes, the [Lerchenauer See](/wiki/Lerchenauer_See "Lerchenauer See"), [Fasaneriesee](/wiki/Fasaneriesee "Fasaneriesee"), [Feldmochinger See](/wiki/Feldmochinger_See "Feldmochinger See") ([Dreiseenplatte](/wiki/Dreiseenplatte "Dreiseenplatte")) and [Landschaftssee Allacher Lohe](/w/index.php?title=Landschaftssee_Allacher_Lohe&action=edit&redlink=1 "Landschaftssee Allacher Lohe (page does not exist)") as well as part of the [Oberschleißheim regatta course](/w/index.php?title=Oberschlei%C3%9Fheim_regatta_course&action=edit&redlink=1 "Oberschleißheim regatta course (page does not exist)"). Green areas include [Panzerwiese](/wiki/Panzerwiese "Panzerwiese"), [Schwarzhölzl](/w/index.php?title=Schwarzh%C3%B6lzl&action=edit&redlink=1 "Schwarzhölzl (page does not exist)") and [Hartelholz](/wiki/Hartelholz "Hartelholz").
